summary: Over the past day (Feb 26-27, 2026), SoSoValue, Sodex, and SSI Index discussions on X remain centered on community engagement and promotional activities within the crypto ecosystem. SoSoValue is highlighted through daily crypto market updates shared by users like @rodinei_jo22478, covering trends such as AI Agents (+2.09%), Modular Blockchain (+1.55%), and Nvidia earnings impacts, alongside reminders for Season 2 SoPoints with TGE in May and Q1 distributions. Sodex sees active promotion via referral links for trading incentives, zero spot maker fees in Growth Mode Week 3 (Tier 4), and staking for points, with users like @Le290788 nearing weekly targets and Portuguese/Spanish posts emphasizing low fees (e.g., Perps Maker 0.002%) to attract volume before Dynamic Fee Tiers launch on March 12. SSI Index appears in staking contexts (ssi.sosovalue.com) and older giveaways referencing $MAG7.SSI, indicating ongoing utility in rewards and indices without major new developments.
